control.narrative: missing/mismatched closures (normal form): [('universe', 'catalog'), ('universe', 'budget')]; checklist flooded (4 items > max 2)
checklist: basis: budget is a target-setting spine, not an event log — is a missing (store,day) row a genuine zero target or an unset gap? Declare which before any coverage measure rides on it.

additivity: 'target' is a budget value at (store,day) grain — additive across stores and across days as a sum-of-plan, but confirm it is a per-day flow and not a restated period snapshot (which would be non-additive over day).

refutation: store_id has no catalog PK/FK to any store table (no store dimension present) — this edge is inferred by name only; sample store_id values to confirm before trusting, and flag as degraded if unbacked.

additivity: target is a budget goal per (store,day) — additive across both stores and days, but SUM over days double-counts nothing while comparison to actuals is the intended use; confirm it is a true amount, not a pre-set rate
